学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a 985, 211, and Double First-Class university. In the Soft Science Chinese University Rankings, it ranked 21st in 2021 and remained stable at 22nd from 2022 to 2026, firmly in the national Top 30, with a high university level and strong comprehensive strength; from 2022 to 2024, reputation evaluations were negative to significantly negative, mainly involving admission gaps, controversy over the buddy program, and self-investigation of academic misconduct; in 2026, reputation is somewhat negative (continuation of the buddy program incident); Douyin total popularity ranking 20th (high heat), with comprehensive popularity of about 2.49 million, indicating high attention; historical admission anomaly signals include a gap in Shaanxi in 2022, a drop of 6414 positions in Journalism and Communication in 2023, and a 63-point drop in the admission line for Science in Sichuan in 2024, with negative public opinion exerting some psychological pressure on applications; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, there are 19 disciplines rated A- or above, with Mathematics A+ as the flagship, Chinese Language and Literature A, Foreign Languages and Literature A, Control Science and Engineering A, Marxist Theory A, etc., with strong disciplinary strength, exerting strong attraction for applications to related majors.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous decline trend in historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (72 vs 76), the high university level but somewhat negative reputation, high Douyin popularity, and a slight decrease in the total number of candidates in the province, based on the 2025 baseline of 6983, but with a strong declining trend, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 6763, with a range of 6263–7263.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2021, the minimum ranking for Medicine was 2943 (planned enrollment 9), in 2022 it was 3512 (planned enrollment 9), in 2023 it was 4364 (planned enrollment 8), in 2024 it was 4924 (planned enrollment 10), and in 2025 it was 6983 (planned enrollment 10). Over the five years, the ranking has continuously increased, from 2943 to 6983, reflecting the intensifying competition for Shandong University's Medicine programs in Heilongjiang Province. In 2026, the enrollment plan is significantly reduced to 4 (only retaining Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program) with 2 spots and 5+3 Integrated Program with 2 spots), a decrease of 6 from 2025, a reduction of 60%, which will have a significant downward pull on the ranking.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Shandong University is a national key university directly under the Ministry of Education, a key construction university of the national '985 Project' and '211 Project', selected as a 'Double First-Class' construction university, with strong comprehensive strength. The Qilu Medical brand has a long history, and the Clinical Medicine discipline is outstanding, enjoying a high reputation nationwide, and continues to attract high-scoring candidates from Heilongjiang Province.

专业热度与地域.title: Program Popularity and Location
专业热度与地域.text: Clinical Medicine programs have long been popular for admissions, with the 5+3 Integrated training model particularly favored by high-scoring candidates. Shandong University is located in Jinan City, Shandong Province, with a superior geographical location and convenient transportation. In 2026, only two Clinical Medicine programs will be offered, with highly concentrated enrollment, and competition is expected to be more intense, but the significant reduction in enrollment also causes the ranking to move forward significantly compared to 2025.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the supply-demand elasticity model and historical ranking trends, the predicted minimum admission ranking for Shandong University's Medicine programs in Heilongjiang Province in 2026 is approximately 4549, with a fluctuation range of 4321-4777. Affected by the significant reduction in enrollment plan, the ranking has moved forward significantly (easier to enter) compared to the 2025 ranking of 6983, but still higher than the levels from 2021 to 2024, reflecting the structural trend of sustained high popularity of Medicine programs.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program)
- Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2, use Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. In 2026, only two programs, Clinical Medicine (Five-Year Program) and 5+3 Integrated Program, will be offered, both highly competitive. Candidates need to reasonably assess their own rankings.
